::: {#fig-bench-kvproximity}

```{python}
#| label: fig-bench-kvproximity
#| fig-cap: "End-to-end KV spatial query (proximity D=2, R=1, radius=1). Path generation is a fraction of total cost; store lookup dominates for dense stores. Sparse stores in L1 cache approach raw generation throughput."
#| fig-subcap:
#|   - "Total query time by store density"
#|   - "Cost breakdown (dense store)"
dot("""
graph G {
  layout=neato  overlap=false  splines=true  sep=+4
  node [shape=box style=rounded]

  subgraph cluster_total {
    label="Total time per query";  fontsize=11
    empty [label="Empty store\\n15.4 ns\\n0 matches\\npure gen cost" fillcolor="#D8BFD8" style=filled]
    sparse [label="Sparse (9 entries)\\n47.8 ns\\n9 matches·188 Melem/s" fillcolor="#DDA0DD" style=filled]
    dense [label="Dense (10K entries)\\n285 ns\\n9 matches·31.4 Melem/s" fillcolor="#9370DB" fontcolor=white style=filled]
    empty -- sparse -- dense [style=invis]
  }

  subgraph cluster_breakdown {
    label="Dense store breakdown (285 ns)";  fontsize=11
    gen [label="Path gen\\n15 ns (5%)" fillcolor="#90EE90" style=filled]
    lookup [label="9 tree lookups\\n196 ns (69%)" fillcolor="#FFB6C1" style=filled]
    push [label="9 Vec pushes\\n74 ns (26%)" fillcolor="#FFD700" style=filled]
    gen -- lookup -- push [style=invis]
  }

  subgraph cluster_amort {
    label="CoordCubeKV throughput (D=2, R=1, r=1)";  fontsize=11  style=dashed
    t_empty [label="Empty: 584 Melem/s"]
    t_sparse [label="Sparse: 188 Melem/s"]
    t_dense [label="Dense: 31.4 Melem/s"]
    note [label="Throughput limited by tree lookup,\\nnot path generation"]
    t_empty -- t_sparse -- t_dense -- note [style=invis]
  }
}
""")
```

:::
